title: Non-record: Custom sp4096 BPE Tokenizer (1.2827 BPB on 1×H100)
body:
## Custom 4096-Vocab BPE Tokenizer

Non-record submission introducing a custom sp4096 tokenizer trained on 
2M FineWeb documents.

**Key contribution:** 4096-vocab BPE tokenizer achieving 2.75 bytes/token 
vs baseline 2.00 bytes/token (+37.5%). First custom tokenizer submission.

**Score:** val_bpb = 1.28265211 (1×H100, 10 min)
**Baseline:** 1.2244 (8×H100, 10 min)

Note: Score does not beat baseline due to compute difference 
(1×H100 vs 8×H100). Estimated ~1.18-1.20 on 8×H100.

Files added:
- records/track_non_record_16mb/2026-03-20_sp4096_custom_tokenizer/

comments.body:
The sp4096 tokenizer is orthogonal to all existing submissions.
Combining sp4096 + sliding window eval + TTT LoRA could push
BPB significantly below current leaderboard #1 (1.1748).
Happy to collaborate or answer questions.
